description: Zentrale Tempus-Resource Asset-Bibliothek für User Guides, QRGs und Trainings. Generische Icons/Buttons/Chrome sind kundenneutral; 'customer'-Einträge sind sandbox-spezifisch.

conventions.icons: Kleine UI-Icons (16-32px Höhe). Default-Inline-Höhe in DOCX: 14pt (~5mm).
conventions.highlights: Screenshots mit überlagertem gelben/roten Highlight-Rahmen für Step-by-Step-Anleitungen.

chrome_create_view_dropdown.description: Full View Manager dropdown showing the 'Default' row icons and two public views below.

icon_clone.description: Copy / clone icon to duplicate a view (or any cloneable item).

icon_default_star_filled.description: Filled star: the currently selected default view for the screen.

icon_default_star_outline.description: Outline star: click to make this view the default for this screen.

icon_delete_trash.description: Trashcan icon to delete the view (private only — public views cannot be deleted).

icon_drag_handle.description: Drag handle (8 dots) to reorder rows by drag-and-drop.

icon_edit_pencil.description: Pencil icon to rename / edit the active view.

icon_lock.description: Lock icon used to freeze a private view (changes do not persist).

icon_public_eye.description: Blue eye icon: marks a public (administratively shared) view. Always clone it before editing.

icon_tile_plus.description: Plus icon on a tile: quick-add (e.g. Create Project from the Project tile).

icon_topbar_help.description: Help icon: opens the Tempus Help Center in a new tab.
